# Phase 7g — Documentation Site

## Status: Not Started

## Goal

Create a documentation site using Starlight (Astro) covering user guides, API reference,
self-hosting instructions, and contribution guidelines.

## Prerequisites

- Phase 7a (Import & Export) — complete

## Tasks

- [ ] Starlight project setup in `apps/docs/` directory
- [ ] User guide sections:
  - Getting started
  - Modelling (actors, systems, apps, stores, components)
  - Connections
  - Diagrams (C4 levels, navigation)
  - Flows (creation, step types, playback)
  - Tags & perspectives
  - Groups
  - Versions
  - Share links
  - Import/export
  - Blocks (when Phase 8 is complete)
- [ ] Self-hosting guide (Docker setup, configuration)
- [ ] Contributing guide
- [ ] Deploy to GitHub Pages or similar

## Verification

- [ ] Docs site builds successfully
- [ ] All sections have content
- [ ] Navigation works correctly
- [ ] Deploys to public URL
